Rhythm of Day 33
[The degree ascending at the time of start of Saturn's yama
will be the longitude of Gulika, the Kshenika graha, at a given
place. Based on this longitude only, Gulika's effect for a
particular native's results should be predicted (and BT
rectification should be done)]
Thus, clearly understand that, "It is the ascendant
calculated taking the beginning point of Saturn's yama (span
ofGulika; Gulika kala vela), which is termed Gulika, the
Kshenika graha ".
